message:
perf: optimize search, indexing, and token handling

Bulk Embedding Fetch (storage/sqlite.rs):
- Add get_all_embeddings() method that loads all embeddings in a single
  query instead of N individual queries
- Returns Vec<(skill_id, embedding_vector)> for direct index population
- Significantly reduces database round-trips during search initialization

Search Command (cli/commands/search.rs):
- Replace N+1 query pattern with bulk get_all_embeddings() call
- Previously: load_all_skills() then get_embedding() for each skill
- Now: single call to get_all_embeddings(), direct population of index
- Remove unused load_all_skills() helper function
- Applied to both hybrid and semantic search paths

MetaSkill Registry (meta_skills/registry.rs):
- Replace full rebuild_indexes() with incremental add_to_indexes() and
  remove_from_indexes() methods
- On insert: if updating existing entry, remove old index entries first
- Eliminates O(n) index rebuild on every single insert operation
- Critical for large registries where frequent updates occur

Token Packer (core/packing.rs):
- Move deps_satisfied() check from filter chain into the ranking loop
- Previously: filtered out slices with unmet deps before ranking
- Problem: dependencies might be satisfied by higher-ranked slices
  selected in the same pass
- Now: check deps_satisfied() after ranking, allowing slices to be
  selected once their dependencies are added in the same iteration
- Improves packing density for skill sets with interdependencies

Hash Embeddings Tokenizer (search/embeddings.rs):
- Allow '+' and '#' in tokens to preserve language identifiers
  like "C++", "C#", "F#" which were being split incorrectly
- Change minimum token length from >2 to >=2 (allow 2-char tokens)
- Update test comment to clarify single-char token filtering behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
